chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1811 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.7170/25 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.7171/25 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Tarique Sultan Khan, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. When the petitioner was confronted as to completion of work, he submitted that department has not issued the completion certificate. However, he is seeking recovery of outstanding amount bill regarding work done by him. Since no completion certificate has been brought on record, therefore instant petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
